title: thelypteris subalpina
intro: Thelypteris subalpina, also known as the alpine lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris subalpina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
